payload.answer: Captured the architecture preferences and remaining open questions without resolving them.

payload.decision: No final decision on Telegram or model choice; Brain DB is treated as source of truth, Cognee as rebuildable semantic projection, and Slack as a strict memory intake agent.

entity_resolution.reason: No ambiguous entity mapping is required from the summary.

payload.intent: Extract durable architectural preferences and open questions from the chat summary.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection rather than the source of truth.
Slack should function as a strict memory intake agent.
It is still open whether Telegram should be added later.
It is still open which model is cheapest while saturating performance.

details: Preserved two items as open questions.
No superseded or deleted facts were introduced.
